commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens setup wizard text/password prompt handling for nullish or non-string results and adds regression tests for setup wizard, setup helper, and Clack prompter paths.

PR surface: Source +27, Tests +233. Total +260 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source at medium confidence: current setup paths directly trim prompt results, and the related reports show nullish prompt output can reach setup/onboarding crash paths. This read-only review did not run a live interactive reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is one narrow mechanical blocker in the shared Clack prompt normalizer that an automated repair can attempt on the PR branch.

target.title: fix(channels): guard setup wizard text input trimming
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #67366 by hardening the generic channel setup wizard text-input path when an interactive prompter returns a non-string/undefined value at runtime. Current main already has the `formatDocsLink` undefined/null guard, so this PR intentionally stays scoped to `src/channels/plugins/setup-wizard.ts` and the channel setup text-input regression.

This carries forward the useful setup-wizard investigation from #66882 (@nikilster), #67137 (@tobemorelucky), and the closed representative #67374 while avoiding the earlier bot-reviewed pitfall of globally coercing Clack text results in a way that can bypass required-input validation.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/plugins/setup-wizard.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`

## Notes

#67693 is security-sensitive in the ClawSweeper preflight artifact and is intentionally routed to central security handling, not used as a source branch for this repair.

ClawSweeper 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: gitcrawl-2160-fix-handle-undefined-rawvalue-in-setup-wizard-text-input
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/66882, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67137, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67374
- Credit: Preserve source credit for @nikilster via https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/66882, which identified undefined Clack text results in the setup wizard path.; Preserve source credit for @tobemorelucky via https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67137, which also targeted skipped optional setup input trim crashes.; Mention representative closed PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67374 as cluster context when opening the replacement PR.; Do not credit bot-only accounts in changelog/release notes; OpenClaw release automation owns CHANGELOG.md.
- Validation: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/plugins/setup-wizard.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead.

Inherited issue-closing references from the source PR:
Closes #66945
Fixes openclaw/openclaw#67366

Co-author credit kept:
- @nikilster: Co-authored-by: Nikil Viswanathan <1175050+nikilster@users.noreply.github.com>
- @tobemorelucky: Co-authored-by: tobemorelucky <205934056+tobemorelucky@users.noreply.github.com>
- @dagangtj: Co-authored-by: dagangtj <65108318+dagangtj@users.noreply.github.com>
